title: Evidence Block Format
description: Fixed evidence format used in LLMAnswerProvider prompt construction.

example.block:
[cit-1] (source: guide.txt, relevance: 0.95):
RAGRig is a retrieval-augmented generation platform.

parts.text: RAGRig is a retrieval-augmented generation platform.

field_structure.citation_id: string — pattern 'cit-{N}' where N is 1-indexed retrieval rank
